code: export const foods=[{id:1,name:"Classic Burger",price:8,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550547660-d9450f859349?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=3a6b8f9b1c4e8f4d7b7a",description:"Beef patty, lettuce, tomato, special sauce",category:"Burgers"},{id:2,name:"Margherita Pizza",price:12,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548365328-9b1a1f9a1b4b?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=5d0b2f8a4a3c",description:"Fresh mozzarella, basil, tomato sauce",category:"Pizza"},{id:3,name:"Chicken Caesar",price:10,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562967916-eb82221dfb36?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=6d4f2c6a0a3e",description:"Grilled chicken, romaine, parmesan",category:"Salads"},{id:4,name:"Sushi Platter",price:18,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544025162-d76694265947?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=9b8c4c3a2a5f",description:"Assorted nigiri and rolls",category:"Sushi"},{id:5,name:"Vegan Bowl",price:11,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1527549993586-dff825b37782?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=2f9c1b3d6e7a",description:"Quinoa, roasted veg, tahini",category:"Vegan"},{id:6,name:"Pancake Stack",price:7,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551218808-94e220e084d2?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=0b1c6f7c9d3e",description:"Fluffy pancakes with syrup",category:"Breakfast"},{id:7,name:"Spicy Ramen",price:13,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543353071-087092ec393b?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=8d6f5b2a4c1d",description:"Rich broth, noodles, chili oil",category:"Noodles"},{id:8,name:"Chocolate Cake",price:6,image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542826438-0b4a91f2b2c5?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=7c4d2e1f3a6b",description:"Decadent chocolate slice",category:"Dessert"}];

sourcesContent:
export const foods = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Classic Burger",
    price: 8,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550547660-d9450f859349?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=3a6b8f9b1c4e8f4d7b7a",
    description: "Beef patty, lettuce, tomato, special sauce",
    category: "Burgers"
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Margherita Pizza",
    price: 12,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548365328-9b1a1f9a1b4b?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=5d0b2f8a4a3c",
    description: "Fresh mozzarella, basil, tomato sauce",
    category: "Pizza"
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Chicken Caesar",
    price: 10,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562967916-eb82221dfb36?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=6d4f2c6a0a3e",
    description: "Grilled chicken, romaine, parmesan",
    category: "Salads"
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Sushi Platter",
    price: 18,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544025162-d76694265947?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=9b8c4c3a2a5f",
    description: "Assorted nigiri and rolls",
    category: "Sushi"
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Vegan Bowl",
    price: 11,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1527549993586-dff825b37782?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=2f9c1b3d6e7a",
    description: "Quinoa, roasted veg, tahini",
    category: "Vegan"
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Pancake Stack",
    price: 7,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551218808-94e220e084d2?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=0b1c6f7c9d3e",
    description: "Fluffy pancakes with syrup",
    category: "Breakfast"
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Spicy Ramen",
    price: 13,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543353071-087092ec393b?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=8d6f5b2a4c1d",
    description: "Rich broth, noodles, chili oil",
    category: "Noodles"
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Chocolate Cake",
    price: 6,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542826438-0b4a91f2b2c5?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&s=7c4d2e1f3a6b",
    description: "Decadent chocolate slice",
    category: "Dessert"
  }
];
